description: Contract governing the handoff of principle-alignment evaluation results from the Principle Alignment Module to the Epistemic Generation Gateway.

atom_id.description: ID of the semantic atom evaluated by PAM.

source_intent_id.description: ID of the originating IDE intent, carried forward from the semantic atom.

paig_score.description: Principle Alignment Index Grade score. 1.0 = full alignment.

detail.description: Optional human-readable detail about the violation.

principle_violations.description: List of principle violations detected. Empty array if alignment_status=ALIGNED.

drift_inherited.description: drift_score inherited from the SBM semantic atom.

veil_level_inherited.description: veil_level inherited from CFC via the semantic atom.

guarantees: atom_id references a valid semantic atom that passed SBM_PAM contract.
source_intent_id references a valid IDE intent ID.
alignment_status is one of ALIGNED, MISALIGNED, FLAGGED.
principle_violations is present (may be empty array).
principle_violations is empty if and only if alignment_status=ALIGNED.
drift_inherited and veil_level_inherited match the values from the originating semantic atom.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

MISALIGNED_ATOM.description: alignment_status=MISALIGNED. Atom must not be forwarded to EGG.
MISALIGNED_ATOM.escalation: Log and emit PAM_MISALIGNED event. Do not forward to EGG. Record principle_violations in audit log.

CRITICAL_PRINCIPLE_VIOLATION.description: At least one principle_violations entry has severity=CRITICAL.
CRITICAL_PRINCIPLE_VIOLATION.escalation: Log and emit PAM_CRITICAL event regardless of alignment_status. Do not forward to EGG.

PAIG_SCORE_OUT_OF_RANGE.escalation: Log and emit PAM_ERROR event. Do not forward to EGG.

FLAGGED_ATOM.description: alignment_status=FLAGGED. EGG must annotate generated output with PAM_FLAGGED marker.
FLAGGED_ATOM.escalation: Forward to EGG with PAM_FLAGGED annotation.
